## Meeting Purpose

[Explore GrowthX's AI-powered content creation and SEO services for Smith.ai's growth needs.](https://fathom.video/share/-89GGixXsnG7Wxjyt-zxcULDa8q1Y7_o?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Smith.ai faces challenges with SEO competition, job seeker noise, and updating content for new AI offerings](https://fathom.video/share/-89GGixXsnG7Wxjyt-zxcULDa8q1Y7_o?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)
  - [GrowthX offers AI-assisted content creation with human editing, capable of high-volume, quality output](https://fathom.video/share/-89GGixXsnG7Wxjyt-zxcULDa8q1Y7_o?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)
  - [Focus on quick wins for Smith.ai's voice assistant (VA) product, aiming for \~100 leads/month initially](https://fathom.video/share/-89GGixXsnG7Wxjyt-zxcULDa8q1Y7_o?tab=summary&timestamp=1920.0)
  - [Next steps: GrowthX to conduct mini-audit and prepare proposal for rapid content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/-89GGixXsnG7Wxjyt-zxcULDa8q1Y7_o?tab=summary&timestamp=1758.0)

## Topics

### Smith.ai's Current SEO Challenges

  - [High domain authority (74 according to Ahrefs) but facing stiff competition](https://fathom.video/share/-89GGixXsnG7Wxjyt-zxcULDa8q1Y7_o?tab=summary&timestamp=304.0)
  - [Significant job seeker traffic diluting desired audience](https://fathom.video/share/-89GGixXsnG7Wxjyt-zxcULDa8q1Y7_o?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
  - [Need to update extensive content (1,800+ blog posts, hundreds of landing pages) for new AI product offerings](https://fathom.video/share/-89GGixXsnG7Wxjyt-zxcULDa8q1Y7_o?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)
  - [Struggle with low-quality content still ranking well (e.g., listicles)](https://fathom.video/share/-89GGixXsnG7Wxjyt-zxcULDa8q1Y7_o?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

### GrowthX's AI-Powered Content Creation Process

  - [Uses custom research agents and LLMs to gather, process, and store information](https://fathom.video/share/-89GGixXsnG7Wxjyt-zxcULDa8q1Y7_o?tab=summary&timestamp=730.0)
  - [Human editors guide the process, ensuring quality and brand alignment](https://fathom.video/share/-89GGixXsnG7Wxjyt-zxcULDa8q1Y7_o?tab=summary&timestamp=747.0)
  - [Capable of producing 50+ quality "seed" articles per month](https://fathom.video/share/-89GGixXsnG7Wxjyt-zxcULDa8q1Y7_o?tab=summary&timestamp=484.0)
  - [Can handle content updates, from minor tweaks to full rewrites](https://fathom.video/share/-89GGixXsnG7Wxjyt-zxcULDa8q1Y7_o?tab=summary&timestamp=1236.0)
  - [Offers programmatic content creation for scale (e.g., city-specific pages)](https://fathom.video/share/-89GGixXsnG7Wxjyt-zxcULDa8q1Y7_o?tab=summary&timestamp=1364.0)

### Quick Wins Strategy

  - [Aaron Lee emphasized the need for rapid results within the first quarter](https://fathom.video/share/-89GGixXsnG7Wxjyt-zxcULDa8q1Y7_o?tab=summary&timestamp=1845.0)
  - [Focus on leveraging existing content and domain authority](https://fathom.video/share/-89GGixXsnG7Wxjyt-zxcULDa8q1Y7_o?tab=summary&timestamp=1857.0)
  - [Target \~100 qualified leads per month as initial proof of concept](https://fathom.video/share/-89GGixXsnG7Wxjyt-zxcULDa8q1Y7_o?tab=summary&timestamp=1922.0)
  - [GrowthX can begin publishing by week 2-3 of engagement, fully ramped by week 4](https://fathom.video/share/-89GGixXsnG7Wxjyt-zxcULDa8q1Y7_o?tab=summary&timestamp=1945.0)

### Voice Assistant (VA) Product Focus

  - [Priority is driving traffic and leads for Smith.ai's new AI-powered voice assistant](https://fathom.video/share/-89GGixXsnG7Wxjyt-zxcULDa8q1Y7_o?tab=summary&timestamp=2040.0)
  - [Need to update existing content to reflect new AI capabilities alongside human services](https://fathom.video/share/-89GGixXsnG7Wxjyt-zxcULDa8q1Y7_o?tab=summary&timestamp=2035.0)
  - [Opportunity to create new content specifically targeting VA audience](https://fathom.video/share/-89GGixXsnG7Wxjyt-zxcULDa8q1Y7_o?tab=summary&timestamp=2047.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to add Smith.ai team to Slack Connect for communication](https://fathom.video/share/-89GGixXsnG7Wxjyt-zxcULDa8q1Y7_o?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)

  - [Follow-up meeting scheduled for Monday, January 15th at 12:30 PM ET / 9:30 AM PT](https://fathom.video/share/-89GGixXsnG7Wxjyt-zxcULDa8q1Y7_o?tab=summary&timestamp=2066.0)
  - [GrowthX to prepare proposal for rapid content strategy focused on voice assistant product](https://fathom.video/share/-89GGixXsnG7Wxjyt-zxcULDa8q1Y7_o?tab=summary&timestamp=1900.0)
